name: Snickers Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chopped Snickers candy evenly over the pie shell.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the sugar, softened cream cheese, beaten eggs, creamy peanut butter, and sour cream. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over the top of the candy in the pie shell.
4. Sprinkle the roasted peanuts around the outer edge of the pie.
5. Drizzle the melted chocolate over the peanuts.
6. Chill the pie for at least 1 hour before serving to allow the filling to set.
